entities.name: GROUNDWATER DROUGHTS
entities.description: Spatio-temporal distribution of severity and duration of groundwater depletion in an aquifer

entities.name: PROBABILISTIC-BASED GROUNDWATER MODEL
entities.description: A model developed to address the severity and duration of groundwater droughts

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL AND METEOROLOGICAL INDICES
entities.description: Indices used to analyze groundwater drought in previous studies

entities.name: JOINT PROBABILITY DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The statistical distribution of groundwater drought risk and return period

entities.name: GROUNDWATER DROUGHT RISK
entities.description: A risk metric calculated to assess the impact of groundwater droughts

entities.name: RETURN PERIOD
entities.description: The average time interval between drought events of specific severity and duration

entities.name: DSS MODULE
entities.description: A Decision Support System module used to calculate groundwater drought risk and environmental hazard index

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL HAZARD INDEX
entities.description: An index used to assess the vulnerability of regions to external stresses

entities.name: PROBABILITY DISTRIBUTION METHOD
entities.description: The method used by the DSS module to calculate risk and hazard indices

entities.name: COPULA METHOD
entities.description: A method used to calculate the return period of drought events based on joint probability

entities.name: SINA BASIN
entities.description: The study area located in Maharashtra, India

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: The state in India where the Sina basin is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: STANDARDISED WATER INDEX
entities.description: An index used for quantifying groundwater droughts over the Sina basin

entities.name: RELIABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The principle used to calculate risk and hazard indices for different drought bands

entities.name: DROUGHT BANDS
entities.description: Categories of drought severity including Mild, Moderate, Severe, and Extreme

entities.name: BEED REGION
entities.description: A vulnerable area in the northeastern region of the Sina basin

entities.name: GROUNDWATER RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of the groundwater system to withstand drought conditions
